nodes.label: Deliverables (in this folder — do not touch anything else)
The data contract (render from exactly this; sample values included)
DEFER — consciously postponed (each entry: why + when to revisit)
Intake adapters: GitHub / GitLab issues + Jira (P6)
Packaging & publish: npm `rivet-kit` + plugin marketplace listing (P7)
Sonnet-driven temporary e2e demo (master-prompt dry run)
LEDGER — generated from the journal; do not edit
Notepad App — Rivet Dogfood Master Prompt
RESUME — state-only handoff (generated from the journal; do not edit)
TRACKING — per-requirement Definition of Done (generated; do not edit)
Rivet learnings — append-only; a lesson counts once PROMOTED or HARDENED
2026-06-11 Build-intent must veto research keywords in routing
2026-06-11 Proof identity must be the TESTED TREE, not the commit SHA  ⟨P1 · BLOCKER⟩
2026-06-11 The spec→gate link must never freeze or clobber  ⟨P1⟩
2026-06-11 User-editable inputs must never crash; infra errors are not test failures  ⟨P1⟩
2026-06-11 All gates must share one predicate, and absence of state must block  ⟨P1⟩
2026-06-11 Worst-of obligation semantics everywhere — including the PR headline  ⟨P1 · quick⟩
2026-06-11 Read-only must be read-only; retries must not burn deterministic reds  ⟨P2⟩
2026-06-11 Verification and review catch DIFFERENT bug classes — keep both
2026-06-11 The 17-gate proposal: menu yes, mandate no
2026-06-11 Gates can FORCE investigation, not just block (ECC GateGuard)
2026-06-11 Protect the gates from the agent (anti-gaming)
2026-06-11 Gate packs: tier classifier + phase mask + security floor + YAML rules
2026-06-11 Journal upgrades: governance events + "confidence is not approval"
2026-06-11 Skill integration: COMPOSE, don't vendor (superpowers + ECC, both MIT)
2026-06-12 A grammar that can't spell its own kinds drops obligations silently
2026-06-12 Test fixtures must pin every git assumption the host can override
2026-06-12 The journal must not stale its own proofs
2026-06-11 Doctor's graphify install hint reads as a typosquat to security tooling
2026-06-11 "Stack" names two disjoint enums — config rejects the runner vocabulary
2026-06-12 The printed proof stamp showed HEAD, not the proof's identity
2026-06-12 Provenance lines must not pin facts that rot (or were never true)
2026-06-12 PR body and LEDGER still stamp commit sha (anticipated tail of the proof-display lesson)
2026-06-12 A broken session must cost zero re-orientation  ⟨P2⟩
2026-06-12 Requirement ids are read by humans out of context — they must self-describe
2026-06-12 Edge-case coverage mandates in prose are ignorable — make absence detectable
2026-06-12 A green task is not a green project — "Build ALL + run ALL kinds" needs one command
2026-06-12 Post-task evidence must be scannable — table, not prose
2026-06-12 Emoji are an event-type grammar — central map with a plain fallback
2026-06-12 Init must seed standards, not just folders — per-platform law packs
2026-06-12 The graph layer must not depend on someone else's pip package
2026-06-12 Depth on one harness beats breadth — say it out loud
Feature: CLI audit trail & progress visibility
Requirement REQUIREMENT_AUDIT-01 — every CLI invocation is audit-logged
Requirement REQUIREMENT_AUDIT-02 — the audit trail is readable
Requirement REQUIREMENT_PROG-01 — progress with emoji after completing a task
Requirement NFR_AUDIT-03 — auditing never breaks the CLI
The input contract — the tool never changes, only its inputs
rivet-finish — landing a branch is a ritual, not a vibe
2. The menu — present exactly these 4 options, nothing open-ended
Intake — ideas are external files, the tool only consumes input
Rivet retro — lessons compound or they repeat
The ledger (`.rivet/learnings.md` — append-only, data not code)
Rivet review — two passes, findings listed, no quotas
Receiving review feedback (when Rivet's work is reviewed)
File shape (`.rivet/specs/<feature>.md`) — Gherkin is the default format
WHEN any rivet command runs inside a Rivet project THEN the system SHALL append a `cli.run` event (command path + arguments + timestamp) to the append-only journal `.rivet/journal.jsonl`.

nodes.id: test:test/cli-ux.test.ts::audits cli invocations into the journal
nodes.label: test/cli-ux.test.ts::audits cli invocations into the journal
IF rivet runs outside a Rivet project THEN the system SHALL NOT write any audit event.

nodes.id: test:test/cli-ux.test.ts::does not create journals outside Rivet projects
nodes.label: test/cli-ux.test.ts::does not create journals outside Rivet projects
WHEN `rivet log` runs THEN the system SHALL print the journal events in chronological order with timestamps and per-type emoji, and WHEN `--json` is passed THEN the system SHALL emit raw JSONL.

nodes.id: test:test/cli-ux.test.ts::renders the audit trail with per-type emoji
nodes.label: test/cli-ux.test.ts::renders the audit trail with per-type emoji
IF the journal contains an event missing its data payload THEN the system SHALL render the audit trail without crashing.

nodes.id: test:test/robust.test.ts::a structurally-valid event missing `data` does not brick log or the task fold
nodes.label: test/robust.test.ts::a structurally-valid event missing `data` does not brick log or the task fold
progress with emoji after completing a task

WHEN a task transitions to done THEN the system SHALL display the remaining tasks and features with per-task emoji status, per-check proof lights, an overall progress bar with percentage, and the suggested next task.

nodes.id: test:test/cli-ux.test.ts::renders progress with emoji, bar, and next-up
nodes.label: test/cli-ux.test.ts::renders progress with emoji, bar, and next-up

Scenario: empty board shows an explicit empty state, not a broken bar — Given a project with no tasks When the progress view renders Then it states there are no tasks instead of rendering an empty bar

nodes.id: test:test/cli-ux.test.ts::renders an explicit empty state when there are no tasks
nodes.label: test/cli-ux.test.ts::renders an explicit empty state when there are no tasks
IF rivet runs outside a Rivet project THEN the system SHALL NOT create a journal or write any audit event.
